name: wordpress-plugin
description: Generates complete WordPress plugins from scratch with WordPress Coding Standards compliance, security guardrails, internationalization, conditional asset enqueueing, custom tables via dbDelta() with proper indexes, and a complete uninstall script. Scaffolds a brand-new plugin tree only - for targeted/iterative edits to an existing plugin use wp-builder-pro, for theme conversion use html-to-wordpress-theme, for review/audit use wordpress-architect-review or wordpress-consultant.
